pages.text: On an icy winter morning, Thembeka wakes up dreaming of the summer sun. “Time to get dressed, Thembeka!” says uBaba.

blocks.text: On an icy winter morning, Thembeka wakes up dreaming of the summer sun.
“Time to get dressed, Thembeka!” says uBaba.

pages.text: “I hate being cold,” Thembeka grumbles. “When will it be warm again, Baba?” “When spring comes.”

blocks.text: “I hate being cold,” Thembeka grumbles. “When will it be warm again, Baba?”
“When spring comes.”

pages.text: “But I want to wear flip-flops so I can wriggle my toes,” Thembeka moans, putting on her boots.

blocks.text: “But I want to wear flip-flops so I can wriggle my toes,” Thembeka moans, putting on her boots.

pages.text: “I want to swim in the pool with my friends today.”

blocks.text: “I want to swim in the pool with my friends today.”

pages.text: “I want to eat ice cream now, Baba!”

blocks.text: “I want to eat ice cream now, Baba!”

pages.text: Outside, the wind is freezing. “Brrrrr!” “I want to r-r-ride my b-b-bicycle,” Thembeka says, her teeth chattering.

blocks.text: Outside, the wind is freezing. “Brrrrr!”
“I want to r-r-ride my b-b-bicycle,” Thembeka says, her teeth chattering.

pages.text: Thembeka angrily crosses her arms. “I hate winter!”

blocks.text: Thembeka angrily crosses her arms. “I hate winter!”

pages.text: Thembeka Soon they is arrive still feeling at uGogo’s cold and house. cross. Then she sniffs the air. What’s that smell? That wonderful, amazing, mouth-watering smell?

blocks.text: Thembeka Soon they is arrive still feeling at uGogo’s cold and house. cross. Then she sniffs the air.
What’s that smell?
That wonderful, amazing, mouth-watering smell?

pages.text: “It’s my famous vegetable soup,” says uGogo. “I only make it in winter.” “I guess I’ll try some...” Thembeka says doubtfully.

blocks.text: “It’s my famous vegetable soup,” says uGogo. “I only make it in winter.”
“I guess I’ll try some...” Thembeka says doubtfully.

pages.text: uGogo serves them steaming bowls of soup.

blocks.text: uGogo serves them steaming bowls of soup.

pages.text: uGogo and uBaba look at Thembeka as she lifts her spoon to her mouth... What will she think?

blocks.text: uGogo and uBaba look at Thembeka as she lifts her spoon to her mouth...
What will she think?

pages.text: “Mmmmm”. She has never tasted anything so delicious. The soup warms her up from the inside out. “I love winter!”

blocks.text: “Mmmmm”.
She has never tasted anything so delicious. The soup warms her up from the inside out.
“I love winter!”
